teams.description: Owns catalog cache generation and model conversion workflows; aligned to the catalog-to-listing data pipeline and serving cache population.

teams.label: nexus-conversion-dev

teams.description: Owns the authoritative catalog entity store (nexus-core) and its immediate platform support services. Acts as an internal platform providing Entity CRUD to all other Nexus teams and to external teams via x-as-a-service. Also owns async entity writing infrastructure.

teams.label: nexus-core-dev

teams.description: Owns the seller feed ingestion pipeline end-to-end: feed API, feed processing workers, media handling, and warehouse data ingestion. Aligned to the seller feed submission and data ingestion flow.

interactions.description: nexus-feed-worker calls CacheWorkerService to invalidate and regenerate caches after feed changes

teams.label: nexus-ingestion-dev

teams.description: Owns statistical anomaly detection, real-time monitoring, issue tracking, backup/restore, and platform health status. Specializes in the deep statistics and reliability capabilities that underpin catalog quality guarantees.

teams.label: nexus-observability-dev

teams.description: Owns operational tooling and developer-facing catalog interfaces. Primary focus: operational migration workflows, catalog tooling, and developer experience interfaces (MCP, CLI).
teams.label: nexus-platform-dev

teams.description: Owns entity publishing, validation, and downstream enrichment services including entity construction, async writes, and data scrubbing. Aligned to the entity publishing and distribution flow.

teams.label: nexus-publisher-dev

teams.description: Nexus sub-team that owns quality frameworks, enrichers, validators, indexed query, catalog indexing, and data transformation pipeline. Provides specialized indexing and transformation capabilities to the Nexus platform.

interactions.description: nexus-transformer and nexus-indexer read and write entities via nexus-core's EntityService

teams.label: nexus-quality-dev

teams.description: Owns the shopper-facing serving layer: the CatalogServing API, the serving gateway, and the serving-ingestor that keeps serving data synchronized. Aligned to the consumer read path.

interactions.description: Serving-ingestor reads full entity details from nexus-core when processing change notifications

teams.label: nexus-serving-dev

teams.description: External partner team that owns the social media content ingestion service (nexus-social-ingester). Deploys and operates a service within the Nexus platform boundary but is not part of the Nexus org.
